description: Canonical order-status spec for madkrapow. Single source of truth for the orders.status enum, transitions, labels, color roles, and dispatch banner messages. Generated artifacts in apps/web/src/lib/orders/status.ts and packages/madkrapow_orders/lib/order_status.g.dart MUST agree with this file. CI parity check: scripts/check-order-status-parity.ts.

notifyMessages.preparing: ✅ Your order #{orderNumber} is now being prepared!
notifyMessages.ready: 🍽️ Your order #{orderNumber} is ready for pickup/delivery!
notifyMessages.picked_up: 🚚 Your order #{orderNumber} has been picked up by the driver!
notifyMessages.delivered: 🎉 Your order #{orderNumber} has been delivered! Enjoy your meal!

manual_review.title: Delivery flagged for manual review
manual_review.body: Driver rejection limit reached — Lalamove could not assign a replacement driver. Choose: retry delivery, contact the customer, or cancel the order.
manual_review.customerBody: We hit a delivery hiccup and our team is working on it. We'll keep you posted.

failed.title: Delivery failed
failed.body: Order expired — no driver was assigned within the Lalamove expiry window. Choose: retry delivery, contact the customer, or cancel the order.
failed.customerBody: We couldn't dispatch a driver in time. Our team is sorting this out.

driver_assigned.title: Driver assigned
driver_assigned.body: A driver has been assigned and will arrive shortly.
driver_assigned.customerBody: A driver has been assigned and is on the way.

in_transit.title: Driver in transit
in_transit.body: The driver has picked up the order.
in_transit.customerBody: Your order is on the way.
